summary: CRITICAL ISSUES: Workflow references non-existent test file (matrix.test.ts) and fixtures directory (fixtures/basic.json) — will fail immediately. Environment variable bug: line 37 uses `${INPUT_FIXTURE}` without `${{ }}` wrapper, breaking fixture parameter passing. Missing package.json/lock file references. Dead code: index.ts unused. Include/exclude extension logic (matrix.ts:59-77) is complex without sufficient comments or tests. The task requires all tests run via act with comprehensive test coverage, fixtures, and validation output to act-result.txt — none of these are provided. Workflow won't validate with actionlint (missing file references). Unshippable without test file, fixtures, and env var fix.
